command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $head=(git rev-parse HEAD).Trim(); $remote=(git rev-parse origin/main).Trim(); if ($head -ne $remote) { throw 'HEAD not synced with origin/main' }; if ($head -ne 'f8b09fe4b3b3ee91c8ff561a0732c3a5dfa51440') { throw 'unexpected pushed anchor' }; Write-Output ('PASS pushed_anchor=' + $head)"
